summary: Iteration 15 — Pre-Launch Polish 16-item P0 batch. Backend regression: 17/17 iter14 pytest PASS (test_iter14_phase4_prelaunch.py, 1.18s). Frontend Playwright on https://pelisignaali-fi.preview.emergentagent.com (1920x1080) verified 15 of 16 items shipped correctly. ONE BLOCKER: TESTAPI cleanup did NOT happen — /api/content/published still returns document id=9ca75e8b-6a8e-4897-9421-70016be19ced with headline 'TESTAPI_94FC9871 live – 9 001 katsojaa' and slug 'testapi-94fc9871-live-9-001-katsojaa'. It is visible in the homepage Live Activity sidebar 'JULKAISTU SISÄLTÖ' and is the top/most-recent article. Spec explicitly listed this as 'already done — only 3 real Layer 2 articles remain, no TESTAPI in DOM' — that claim is incorrect. All other items verified.

critical.issue: Document id=9ca75e8b-6a8e-4897-9421-70016be19ced with headline 'TESTAPI_94FC9871 live – 9 001 katsojaa' (slug=testapi-94fc9871-live-9-001-katsojaa) was NOT purged from MongoDB published_content collection. Spec required removal. It is the top item by recency so it surfaces on homepage Live Activity. ALSO: 'Jarttu84 live – 1 240 katsojaa' looks like a streamer-livecheck synthetic doc that probably should not be in editorial /uutiset either — only Florida + Antonelli are genuine Layer 2 editorial articles, matching the '3 real Layer 2 articles' claim only if both bot-style 'live – N katsojaa' docs are removed.

ui_bugs.issue: Renders TESTAPI_94FC9871 article because the underlying API still returns it (root cause is backend data, not frontend). 'TESTAPI' substring confirmed present in homepage body text.

action_items: CRITICAL: Run the TESTAPI cleanup script against MongoDB published_content collection — delete the doc id=9ca75e8b-6a8e-4897-9421-70016be19ced (headline 'TESTAPI_94FC9871 live – 9 001 katsojaa', slug 'testapi-94fc9871-live-9-001-katsojaa'). Also evaluate whether 'Jarttu84 live – 1 240 katsojaa' (id=687d8831-642a-404c-81e7-985e528b887d) is real editorial or a streamer-livecheck synthetic that should also be purged so the feed shows only the 2 real Layer 2 articles (Florida + Antonelli) per spec's '3 real Layer 2 articles' wording.

After cleanup, add a guard in the Layer 2 publisher or a defensive filter in /api/content/published that drops headlines/slugs matching /^TESTAPI[_-]/i so the regression cannot reoccur from leftover dev fixtures.
critical_code_review_comments: TESTAPI cleanup was claimed-done in the problem statement but the database was never actually purged. Verify scripts are idempotent and add a one-time migration plus a permanent regex filter at the publisher level so test fixtures cannot leak into production again.

Peli.jsx fetches /api/signup/count for leaderboard count but the endpoint's existence is not regression-tested in test_iter14. If the endpoint changes/404s, the page silently shows fallback 'PÄIVITTYY KISAN ALKAESSA' — fine UX, but worth a smoke test.

LanguageContext.getInitial() forces 'fi' but the consumer still writes localStorage('mittari-lang', lang) on every render in the useEffect. Harmless but means the localStorage entry is unconditionally 'fi' for all users, defeating any future toggle until that effect is rewritten.

Footer admin gear is reachable by /back-office but the route is rendered without auth in App.js (uses X-Admin-Token only in API calls). The gear is intentionally discrete (opacity 0.35) but it is still a clickable element on the public footer — fine for honesty/staff convenience, just be aware crawlers will index the existence.

/peli iframe placeholder is well-handled (Loader2 spinner + Finnish copy) but the placeholder does not include an inline email-capture for the 'OTA HÄLYTYS PÄÄLLE ALLE' microcopy directly under it — the closest capture form is the global PersistentCapture sidebar. Consider lifting an inline form into the iframe panel until Smartico whitelist clears.

success_rate.backend: 100% (17/17 iter14 regression). Data-content failure logged separately as backend_issue.critical — no endpoint code is broken, the MongoDB data is dirty.
success_rate.frontend: 94% — 15/16 P0 items PASS; 1 fails (TESTAPI visible in DOM) but the root cause is backend data, not frontend code.

test_credentials: None required for the public preview surfaces tested. Back-office still X-Admin-Token=putki-hq-admin.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Single blocker is dirty MongoDB data — once main agent purges the TESTAPI document (and optionally the Jarttu84 livecheck doc) from published_content, re-run the iter14 backend pytest (will still pass) and re-curl /api/content/published?limit=10 to confirm headline matching /TESTAPI/i is 0 and url_slug starting with 'testapi' is 0. Frontend will then automatically be clean since it just renders the API feed. All other 15 items (header, footer, /peli, /tietoa-meista, /menetelma, /striimaajat grid, /affiliaatti, /viikon-kortti, TrustStrip, carousel arrows, PaivaVitoset compact + view-all link, Finnish-only language) are verified shipped. New testids added this iter: peli-page / peli-iframe-section / peli-iframe-placeholder / peli-prize-1..3 / peli-step-1..4 / peli-leaderboard-empty / peli-uutiset-link / peli-trust / peli-trust-0..3 / tietoa-meista-page / contact-card-tips/-corrections/-press / tietoa-method-link / methodology-section-0..6 / trust-strip-0..3 / footer-admin-gear / streamer-carousel-prev/-next / paivan-vitoset-view-all / affiliaatti-empty.
rca of the issue: TESTAPI cleanup RCA: The published_content collection still contains id=9ca75e8b-6a8e-4897-9421-70016be19ced (slug=testapi-94fc9871-live-9-001-katsojaa). The cleanup operation referenced in the problem statement was either not executed, executed against a different environment, or failed silently. Reproduction: `curl https://pelisignaali-fi.preview.emergentagent.com/api/content/published?limit=10` — the first item returned matches /^TESTAPI/. Mitigation: (a) run a one-shot Mongo delete filtering on regex {'headline': {'$regex': '^TESTAPI', '$options': 'i'}} or {'url_slug': {'$regex': '^testapi-'}}; (b) add a permanent publisher-side guard that rejects insertions matching that pattern; (c) re-run /api/content/published verification to confirm count drops to 3 (or 2).
